title: Air China Cargo Expands Chengdu Service to Daily Flights from Glasgow Prestwick

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Air China Cargo has upgraded its service frequency on the route from Glasgow Prestwick Airport (PIK) to Chengdu Shuangliu International Airport. The flights, which previously operated less frequently, will now take place daily, enhancing the connectivity for cargo movements between the two locations.

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: The increase in flight frequency is expected to significantly benefit businesses in the region by improving access to international markets and streamlining supply chains. It reflects a growing demand for air cargo services, which is crucial for timely delivery of goods.
